task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Mobile Banking App' project
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenProject interface shows 'Mobile Banking App' in the top navigation bar, project selector, or sidebar menu.

task_completion.description: Access the new version creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is on the 'New version' form or the project settings page for Versions with the creation dialog open.
The text input field for the version's Name contains exactly 'Sprint 4 - Security Hardening'.

task_completion.description: Set the version status to Open
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Status dropdown or selector for the version shows 'Open' as the selected value.
The Date or Due Date input field contains '2025-06-30' or the date picker shows June 30, 2025 selected.

task_completion.description: Successfully save and create the new version
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Successful creation') is visible, or the new version 'Sprint 4 - Security Hardening' is visible in the project's list of versions with the correct status and date.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenProject web interface in a browser, not terminal commands like curl or python scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenProject application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches standard OpenProject styling and layout, rather than a mocked HTML page or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: No database clients (like psql or sqlite3) or backend consoles are visible in the screenshots being used to insert the version record directly.
